title: Gymneia malacophylla
taxonomy: Gymneia malacophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Gymneia, which is a small group of plants native to tropical regions. The exact classification of Gymneia malacophylla can vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the angiosperm division of plants.
